title: User
description: Schema for user documents in the video-game-305 Firestore database. Document ID matches the Firebase Auth UID.

display_name.description: Display name from the auth provider or set by the user

photo_url.description: URL to the user's profile photo

created_time.description: Timestamp when the user account was first created

username.description: App-specific username chosen by the user during profile creation

bio.description: Short bio written by the user about themselves

has_answered_nps.description: Whether the user has completed the NPS survey. Prevents the survey from being shown more than once.
